message:
Fix output system portability and remove dead code

Six targeted fixes to the terminal output abstraction layer introduced
in d6a0a7e, all addressing correctness or portability issues discovered
during testing on minimal terminal environments:

--- ShellCheck SC2064 suppressions (append_exit_trap) ---

Both trap calls in append_exit_trap() intentionally use double-quoted
strings so that $new_cmd and $existing are expanded at definition time,
not at trap-fire time. ShellCheck SC2064 warns about this pattern
because it looks like an accidental early-expansion bug, but here the
early expansion is deliberate: the trap body must capture the current
values of those variables. Added inline disable directives with the
intent documented by the surrounding code.

--- Remove unused NO_COLOR variable ---

The NO_COLOR="false" declaration (line 127) and the NO_COLOR="true"
assignment inside apply_no_color() were both dead code. Nothing in the
script ever reads NO_COLOR after it is set; the function works by
clearing all ANSI escape variable values directly. The flag was likely
a leftover from an earlier design that planned to check NO_COLOR in
individual log functions. Removed both the declaration and assignment.

--- Fix ICON_DRYRUN and ICON_SPARKLES ASCII fallbacks ---

Changed apply_no_unicode() to set ICON_DRYRUN='*' and ICON_SPARKLES='*'
instead of 'DRY' and 'OK'. The multi-character fallbacks broke the
fixed-width column alignment in print_summary() box drawing, where the
icon occupies exactly one character cell. Using '*' is consistent with
ICON_BANNER='*' and matches the single-character contract that all
ICON_* values follow in both Unicode and ASCII modes.

--- Rewrite repeat_char() for multi-byte safety ---

The original implementation used `printf '%*s' "$count" '' | tr ' ' "$ch"`,
which works correctly only when $ch is a single byte. For multi-byte
UTF-8 characters (like the box-drawing glyphs ═, ─, etc.), tr treats
each byte independently, producing mojibake. The new implementation
uses a simple for-loop with string concatenation, which handles any
character regardless of byte length. The performance difference is
negligible since repeat_char() is only called for banner borders
(count=62).

--- print_summary() uses ICON and EM_DASH variables ---

Replaced three remaining hardcoded glyphs in print_summary():
  - 📋 (clipboard emoji in DRY RUN box) -> ${ICON_DRYRUN}
  - ✨ (sparkles emoji in Installation complete box) -> ${ICON_SPARKLES}
  - — (em dash in "Tip: Changes take effect immediately") -> ${EM_DASH}

These were the last hardcoded Unicode literals in the script output.
With this change, --no-unicode mode produces fully ASCII output
throughout the entire installer UI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,8 +52,10 @@ append_exit_trap() {
     local existing=""
     existing=$(trap -p EXIT | sed -E "s/^trap -- '(.*)' EXIT$/\\1/")
     if [[ -n "$existing" ]]; then
+        # shellcheck disable=SC2064
         trap "${new_cmd}; ${existing}" EXIT
     else
+        # shellcheck disable=SC2064
         trap "$new_cmd" EXIT
     fi
 }
@@ -124,7 +126,6 @@ STATUS_JSON="false"
 LOG_FILE=""
 HAS_JQ="false"
 HAS_PYTHON="false"
-NO_COLOR="false"
 NO_UNICODE="false"
 
 log_to_file() {
@@ -159,7 +160,6 @@ set_box_ascii() {
 }
 
 apply_no_color() {
-    NO_COLOR="true"
     RED='' GREEN='' YELLOW='' BLUE='' CYAN='' MAGENTA='' WHITE='' BOLD='' DIM='' ITALIC='' UNDERLINE='' NC=''
     if [[ "$NO_UNICODE" == "true" ]]; then
         set_box_ascii
@@ -176,8 +176,8 @@ apply_no_unicode() {
     ICON_STEP='>'
     ICON_SUCCESS='+'
     ICON_SKIP='.'
-    ICON_DRYRUN='DRY'
-    ICON_SPARKLES='OK'
+    ICON_DRYRUN='*'
+    ICON_SPARKLES='*'
     ICON_BANNER='*'
     ICON_ZAP='!'
     BULLET='*'
@@ -189,7 +189,12 @@ apply_no_unicode() {
 repeat_char() {
     local ch="$1"
     local count="$2"
-    printf '%*s' "$count" '' | tr ' ' "$ch"
+    local out=""
+    local i
+    for ((i = 0; i < count; i++)); do
+        out+="$ch"
+    done
+    printf '%s' "$out"
 }
 
 # -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -2125,11 +2130,11 @@ print_summary() {
     echo ""
     if [[ "$dry_run" == "true" ]]; then
         echo -e "${BLUE}${BOX_TL}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_TR}${NC}"
-        echo -e "${BLUE}${BOX_V}${NC}  ${BLUE}${BOLD}📋 DRY RUN${NC} ${DIM}${ITALIC}— No changes were made${NC}                           ${BLUE}${BOX_V}${NC}"
+        echo -e "${BLUE}${BOX_V}${NC}  ${BLUE}${BOLD}${ICON_DRYRUN} DRY RUN${NC} ${DIM}${ITALIC}${EM_DASH} No changes were made${NC}                           ${BLUE}${BOX_V}${NC}"
         echo -e "${BLUE}${BOX_BL}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_BR}${NC}"
     else
         echo -e "${GREEN}${BOX_TL}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_TR}${NC}"
-        echo -e "${GREEN}${BOX_V}${NC}  ${GREEN}${BOLD}✨ Installation complete!${NC}                                     ${GREEN}${BOX_V}${NC}"
+        echo -e "${GREEN}${BOX_V}${NC}  ${GREEN}${BOLD}${ICON_SPARKLES} Installation complete!${NC}                                     ${GREEN}${BOX_V}${NC}"
         echo -e "${GREEN}${BOX_BL}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_H}${BOX_BR}${NC}"
     fi
     echo ""
@@ -2182,7 +2187,7 @@ print_summary() {
         echo ""
         echo -e "    ${WHITE}\$ ${GREEN}echo '{\"source\":\"compact\"}' | ~/.local/bin/claude-post-compact-reminder${NC}"
         echo ""
-        echo -e "  ${DIM}${ITALIC}Tip: Changes take effect immediately — no restart needed for the hook itself.${NC}"
+        echo -e "  ${DIM}${ITALIC}Tip: Changes take effect immediately ${EM_DASH} no restart needed for the hook itself.${NC}"
         echo -e "  ${DIM}${ITALIC}     Claude Code only needs restarting after the initial installation.${NC}"
         echo ""
     fi
